ab: simakoyab ya am, ya mai rana si wari a mehakay.
ch: 今天傍晚，弟弟就要回家了。
en: My younger brother is going home this evening.

ab: namen mangay si akes do pananazangan so manok, ta dengdengen namen a yakan ni wari a mehakay.
ch: 我和奶奶去市場買雞，準備煮好吃的晚餐給弟弟。
en: My grandma and I went to the market to buy chickens and prepared a delicious dinner for my younger brother.

ab: miavas namen do pananazangan so yasay am, aro do dang o vayo pa nikotod da yasay.
ch: 我們經過了菜攤，那裡有好多新鮮的青菜。
en: We passed the vegetable stand, which had a lot of fresh green vegetables.

ab: kapanazang namen rana so insay a ka no ovi a ka no omaom.
ch: 我們買了空心菜、山藥和山蘇。
en: We bought water spinach, yams and Bird’s-nest fern.

ab: maniring do katangked na o pananazang so asi no kayokayo am “ya maganinam o pinapo a ka no kolitan ya, manazang kamo an!”
ch: 旁邊水果攤的老闆說:「我的鳳梨和芒果很甜。買一些吧!」
en: The owner of the nearby fruit stand said: “My pineapples and mango are very sweet. Buy some!”

ab: miratateng am manazang namen so pinapo a ka no kolitan.
ch: 後來我們買了鳳梨和芒果。

ab: miavas namen do pananazangan so viniay am, maniring o lawpan ”ikongo o ya mo sazangan? o manok siciaraw ya am, ya arako a ya matava paa, ngina no asa am ya atlo a ranaw.”
ch: 我們經過了肉攤，老闆說:「你要買什麼?今天的雞又大又肥，一隻300元。」
en: We passed the meat stall, and the boss said, “What do you want to buy? Today’s chickens are big and fat, and one is 300 NTD.”

ab: singaten ni akes kapacici na so lawpan, a apia kapaveveh so ngina na.
ch: 奶奶覺得太貴了，問老闆可不可以便宜一點。
en: Grandma thought it was too expensive and asked the boss if it could be cheaper.

ab: am maniring o lawpan am “ya ji aveveh rana o ngina na, marahet kapakas paa so ngina na”.
ch: 但老闆說已經很便宜，不能再減了。
en: But the boss said that it is already very cheap and cannot be reduced any further.

ab: mian do katangked na asa ka lawpan am “manazang kamo so among ko an, ta ya ararako a ya maveveh paa so ngina.”
ch: 隔壁的老闆說，來買我的魚，我的魚又大又便宜。
en: The boss next door said, come and buy my fish, my fish is big and cheap.

ab: miratateng am manazang namen rana so manok a ka no among, mian do vahay namen am makapia namen a nimansahad do asa ka akakanan a iyakan.
ch: 最後我們買了雞也買了魚，回家煮了一桌子的菜。
en: In the end we bought chicken and fish, and went home to cook a table of food.

ab: nimownay namen a to nanala si wari, todaji ahep rana.
ch: 我們等了好久，天就快黑了。
en: After waiting for a long time, it was already dark.

ab: mizingwa si wari jiamen am ”ya tongian so makdeng a vazay do itaysang jia, so namen ji miwalami rana, si pisa ka piwalam am ori ko ipiwalam.”
ch: 弟弟打電話回來說：「軍隊突然有重要的事不能放假了，下一個禮拜日是我的假日。」
en: The younger brother called back and said that the army suddenly couldn’t take a vacation and would not be back until the next Sunday.

ab: maniring si akes am “aro a ya nidengdeng ito a, angay panci sira maran mo a maci’angang jiaten.”
ch: 奶奶說已經煮了這麼多，叫舅舅他們一起來吃吧!
en: Grandma said that she has cooked so much, so let’s eat together!

ab: ka panci namen paa nira zipos namen, mai a maci’angang jiamen.
ch: 我們還邀請了其他親朋好友，一起來享用豐盛的晚餐。
en: We invited friends and family to have a great dinner together.
